overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a player character walking through a sunlit dystopian commercial district. The camera circles a silver pickup truck where NPCs are gathered, then proceeds past a red van toward a street corner with a FOODSCAPE restaurant and industrial overpasses.

person in white shirt temporarily blocks view while crossing in front of camera

elevated highway structure with orange warning lights underneath

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit parking lot with a silver pickup truck at the center. Several NPCs in colorful cyberpunk attire dance near the vehicle while the camera circles around to get a better view. The ALL FOODS store sign is visible in the background against a backdrop of towering industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking area with red van and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: moving past the front grille of the silver truck toward the red van area
red van becomes the primary focal point as the truck moves to the background

agents.ego_description: moving past the truck front where a person is lying on the ground, proceeding toward the red van

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket lying on the ground next to crates of bottles
man in tactical gear with red hair inspecting the side of the truck

entered.detail: red delivery van parked in front of metal garage doors with steam venting nearby
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the front of the silver truck, revealing a person lying on the asphalt near green bottle crates. The scene transitions toward a red van parked against a graffiti-covered wall, with industrial garage doors visible in the background. The crowd thins out as the camera leaves the initial gathering area.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with FOODSCAPE restaurant and industrial piping

events.description: leaving the parking area, entering the main street corner with visible traffic
gray pickup truck drives past on the street while pedestrian crosses sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the red van toward the FOODSCAPE intersection, observing street traffic

notable_agents.action: gray pickup truck driving along the street past the FOODSCAPE restaurant
woman in red top and jeans walking on the sidewalk toward the camera

entered.detail: red neon sign reading 'FOODSCAPE' on green building facade with 'RED MUNCHKIN SALES 20%' text below
large cylindrical industrial tanks and overhead pipeline structures
wall painted with '6th St' text and snake-like graffiti

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the parking area onto a street corner featuring the FOODSCAPE restaurant with its prominent red signage. Industrial pipes and tanks dominate the background architecture. A gray truck drives past on the road while pedestrians walk along the sidewalk, and the camera continues toward the intersection with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a lively gathering in a sunlit parking lot toward a bustling industrial street corner. It begins by circling a silver pickup truck surrounded by dancing NPCs in colorful attire, with the ALL FOODS sign and towering industrial structures framing the background. As the camera moves past the front of the truck, it passes a person lying on the asphalt near green bottle crates before shifting toward a red van parked against a graffiti-covered wall. The scene then opens up as the camera leaves the crowd and emerges onto a street corner featuring the prominent red signage of a FOODSCAPE restaurant. Finally, the view expands past industrial pipes and a passing gray truck toward a wide intersection dominated by distant skyscrapers.
